title: Ukrainian Pastry Puffs
description: A delicious and flaky pastry filled with a savory pilaf, inspired by Ukrainian cuisine
instructions: Roll out the golden pastry to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Place the pilaf in the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border.
Fold the pastry over the pilaf, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little water and sprinkle with chopped flaky pastry.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
